title: Spotter droid
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Spotter droids''' were [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] to transmit coordinates for various units. One model was the [[Longvision LV-38 spotter/probe droid]]. Versions held onboard [[YT-5100 Shriek-class bomber|YT-5100 ''Shriek''-class bombers]] resembled silver [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droids]] equipped with odd rifles.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]''
